inputs.image: 夏日视觉降温！自带清冷感的冷却蓝🧊_5_浩川长盛布业_来自小红书网页版.jpg

inputs.text:
Top-down overhead product photography, vertical 9:16 composition. Camera pointing straight down at the fabric. Premium textile shoot, softbox lit.

Main subject (filling 70% of frame center):
  A large piece of hazy-blue slub woven fabric, exact hex #B4C3CD (light blue-gray, low saturation, cool undertone), laid flat on a clean off-white surface. Surface shows clearly visible micro basket-weave / dobby texture with 1-2mm dimensional slubs. Matte sheen only, very subtle highlight on texture peaks. Fabric edges extend beyond the frame implying infinite continuity.

Person (top 1/3 of frame):
  A single stylized CG hand entering from the top edge of the frame, only palm and 5 fingers visible, about 30% into the frame. Palm faces downward toward the fabric. Five fingers naturally spread. The hand is stylized CG, NOT a real human hand — no identifiable person, no real skin blemishes, no age markers. Natural skin tone. NO jewelry, NO watch, NO ring, NO tattoo, NO nail polish. Skin shows realistic texture (fingerprints, palm lines) but no identifying features. There is a 1-2 cm gap between the palm and the fabric — the hand has NOT yet touched the cloth. This is the moment of approach.

Lighting:
  Top softbox key light at 5600K cool white, no warm cast. Very subtle side fill. NO back-light at this moment (back-light only appears in the last frame). No harsh shadows.

Camera:
  50mm equiv., f/4 shallow DoF, focus locked on the fabric center. Hand slightly out of focus but readable.

Mood:
  Premium commercial textile photography. Restrained, calm, high-end. No filter, no grain, no LUT, no color grading artifacts.

Negative:
  No real human face. No identifiable person. No satin/silk/chiffon/denim/wool. No navy/royal/beige/pink. No print, no embroidery, no jacquard. No care label, no hangtag, no logo. No sweat, no oily skin. No watermark, no text overlay.
--ar 9:16 --style raw --v 6
